$comment: Queue of new blockRole vocabulary needs discovered while designing ScreenTypes. add-one-screen-type appends proposed entries; add-one-new-block-role consumes one entry and updates its status only after verification.

candidates.primaryJob: Prioritize a human communication queue and apply ownership or lifecycle actions before opening a conversation.
candidates.distinguishFrom: data-table-panel is generic record comparison and editing; ai-conversation-list is for AI-delegated, streaming chat sessions.

candidates.primaryJob: Author and revise the body of one long-form/structured document inline, with in-context collaboration (comments, attachments).
candidates.distinguishFrom: detail-overview is a read-only labelled-field record summary, not inline-editable prose; form-section is discrete validated form fields, not a free-form document canvas.

candidates.primaryJob: Represent one workflow-status column, its ordered work-item cards, and the accepted card-move operations that change each item's status.
candidates.distinguishFrom: collection-grid presents independently browsable card tiles without a workflow grouping or cross-column move contract; data-table-panel compares generic rows and offers inline edits, not ordered cards whose drop target changes workflow status; filter-toolbar only constrains a collection and does not own columns or card movement.
